overall.description: Spider-Man crouches on a skyscraper ledge overlooking a bustling Times Square-like urban intersection in a high-fidelity video game. The scene features heavy traffic, dense crowds of pedestrians, towering glass buildings with animated digital billboards, and clear midday lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: skyscraper ledge overlooking busy downtown intersection

events.description: flock of birds flies past the right side of the frame

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man crouched on building ledge surveying the city street below

entered.detail: tall dark-tinted glass office tower with reflective windows
tall glass building with multiple digital billboards and purple signage
massive red digital screen displaying advertisements on building facade
horizontal purple digital sign on lower right building
concrete building ledge where Spider-Man is perched
busy downtown street with multiple lanes of traffic and crosswalks

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man remains stationary on a high-rise concrete ledge, overlooking a dense urban intersection reminiscent of Times Square. The view encompasses towering glass skyscrapers on both sides, massive digital billboards including a prominent red screen, and a bustling multi-lane street filled with moving vehicles and scattered pedestrians below. A brief flock of birds passes by on the right side of the frame midway through the clip.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, high-altitude perspective overlooking a dense urban intersection that pulses with the energy of a digital metropolis. It begins with Spider-Man perched stationary on a high-rise concrete ledge, framing a vast vista of towering glass skyscrapers and massive, glowing digital billboards. As the camera lingers on the scene, the focus extends downward to a bustling multi-lane street where a constant flow of vehicles and pedestrians navigate the city floor. The stillness of the vantage point is briefly interrupted as a flock of birds sweeps across the right side of the frame, adding a layer of organic movement to the rigid architectural landscape.
